sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, bitmap_col Bitmap, value String, nullable_col Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3]), 'test', NULL);

SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bitmapAndnot(bitmapBuild([2, 3]), bitmapBuild([1, 3, 4]))) AS bitmaps, (-1 * value.int) AS negated_value FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE nullable_col IS NOT NULL) AS subquery WHERE bitmapAndnot(bitmap_col, bitmapBuild([1, 5])) != bitmapBuild([]) GROUP BY id HAVING negated_value > 0;

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table) as total, bitmapToArray(bitmapAndnot(bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3]), (SELECT bitmap_col FROM test_table WHERE id = 2))) AS res FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) < 10;
SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bitmapAndnot(bitmap_col, bitmapBuild([1, 5]))) AS res FROM test_table WHERE bitmapAndnot(bitmap_col, bitmapBuild([2])) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY (-1 * id) DESC;
